speaker: charlie
text: G'day Queensland, it's Wednesday the 29th of April and you've switched on ParkSyde Bright Side. I'm Alex Mercer and with me is the ever-optimistic Jamie to share the day's good news. Jamie, fair to say there's some proper game-changing stuff happening today?

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely Alex! We've got scientists basically solving bleeding wounds with what sounds like pure magic, plus some brilliant environmental wins. And wait till you hear what our Indian mates are doing in weightlifting!

speaker: charlie
text: Magic is right - this medical breakthrough could literally save lives in emergency rooms around the world. Plus Colombia's hosting a massive climate summit that's getting real results, not just talk. Let's dive into the good stuff shall we?
